llm_training.natural_language_description: The Eternal Petals: Whispered Love - 11 Moonstone Rose Bouquet is a decorative gift product listed on field survey data by The Noodle Place (Circular Road). It consists of 11 everlasting soap roses in white and pink, with porcelain-white petals edged in delicate blush pink, presented in dreamy pink wrapping with a romantic princess ribbon. This item is explicitly NOT a food product and is NOT intended for human consumption. The roses are made from soap and synthetic materials, not fresh flowers or edible ingredients. It is marketed as a Valentine's Day or romantic gift. From a nutritional standpoint, this item has zero energy, zero macronutrients, zero sodium, and zero glycemic impact, as it contains no edible components whatsoever. No approved nutritional database (HPB Singapore Foodo, USDA FoodData Central, ICMR-NIN, FAO/INFOODS SEA) contains a relevant entry for this non-edible decorative soap product. Clinically, this item is irrelevant to dietary management of hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes, or cardiovascular disease. It is priced at SGD 48.00 and represents a non-food retail item sold through a food delivery platform.
